title: satureja × bourlieri
intro: Satureja × bourrieri, also known as Bourrier's savory, is a hybrid plant within the Lamiaceae family, created by crossing Satureja thymbra with Satureja calabrica. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Satureja × bourrieri include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and possessing antimicrobial properties, which can help to prevent infections. The herbal preparations of this plant include teas, essential oils, and infusions, which can be used to treat various health issues, including respiratory problems and skin conditions.
